name: Players Indoor Golf | Indian Lake, Ohio
about: Players Indoor Golf is a premier golf simulation venue located in Indian Lake, Ohio. The facility offers a range of high-quality golf simulators for both casual play and serious practice. It provides a comfortable atmosphere suitable for groups of various sizes, with options for food and beverages to enhance the experience. The venue is designed to cater to golfers looking for a tech-driven environment, combining advanced simulation technology with a social setting.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulation technology for realistic play
On-site food and drink options for convenience
Flexible booking options for individuals and groups
Private rooms for focused practice or events

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar available with cocktails and drinks

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs or rent them on-site if available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not allowed, as the venue offers a full kitchen and bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes 1-2 hours depending on the simulator and number of players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue welcomes families and has a family-friendly atmosphere with options for kids.
